investigation_summary: Clean card: 23M+ member consumer co-op; board elections; 10% dividend; #OptOutside; public-lands advocacy; part-time benefits; Good On You Good. Caveats: 2022–2024 union campaigns — REI contested/delayed bargaining vs worker expectations of co-op values; multi-brand floor sells vendors with mixed records.

profile.tax_summary: Cooperative surplus patronage — different from C-corp tax story.
profile.legal_summary: NLRB filings and union contract fights in national press 2022+.
profile.labor_summary: Retail pay above discounters; tension with newly organized shops.
profile.political_summary: Conservation lobbying; retail footprint expansion debates.
profile.product_health: Sells third-party technical apparel — chemical safety varies by brand.
profile.executive_summary: Multi-billion revenue co-op; exec comp debates internally.
